expectations.text: Creates exactly one TeamCreate with tfx- prefix naming

expectations.evidence: Agent output: '3x TaskCreate(...) with metadata: { cli, role }'

expectations.text: Spawns 3 Agent wrappers with mode: bypassPermissions
expectations.evidence: Agent output: '3x Agent({ mode: bypassPermissions, run_in_background: true })'

expectations.text: Uses tfx-route.sh inside Agent wrapper (not direct codex/gemini)
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'Each wrapper executes bash ~/.claude/scripts/tfx-route.sh. Direct codex exec or gemini -y -p calls are prohibited.'
Agent output: 'Phase 5: TeamDelete() always runs regardless of success/failure, with max 30s wait'
